Han Yan ťüďŚĄľ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Han Yan (ťüďŚĄľ)was born in Baxi commandery. Fell seriously ill and was unable to handle duties. Han Yan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
